_comment: Lever #1 — empirical map: ensemble confidence score -> P(2xATR target hit before 1xATR stop). Built by the scratch/ relabel+backtest pipeline. THIN sample (~64 resolved trades, single regime, late May 2026): the raw score was found NON-predictive (mildly inverted), so isotonic regression flattens it to two steps straddling the 33.3% 2:1 breakeven. NOT trustworthy enough to gate production yet — refresh this file as real closed trades accumulate, then set CALIBRATION_GATE_ENABLED=1.
